name: digitar-extension
description: Asistente de Accesibilidad Visual - Digitalización de actas

scripts.build:usb: webpack --mode production && rm -rf dist-usb && cp -r dist dist-usb && javascript-obfuscator ./dist-usb --output ./dist-usb --compact true --self-defending true --disable-console-output true --string-array-encoding rc4 --rename-globals true
scripts.obfuscate: rm -rf dist-usb && cp -r dist dist-usb && javascript-obfuscator ./dist-usb --output ./dist-usb --compact true --self-defending true --disable-console-output true --string-array-encoding rc4 --rename-globals true
